summary: Private AI autocomplete for every app on your Mac Discussion | Link
content: Typeahead is the writing assistant that writes with you, not for you. It works in every text field on your Mac, helping you type faster and smarter with inline suggestions that appear as you write. It runs on a local AI model, works offline and keeps your writing on your device.
chineseSummary: 为 Mac 上的每个应用程序提供私人 AI 自动完成功能关联
chineseContent: Typeahead 是与您一起写作的写作助手，而不是为您写作。它适用于 Mac 上的每个文本字段，通过在您书写时出现的内联建议，帮助您更快、更智能地输入。它在本地人工智能模型上运行，离线工作并将您的写作保留在您的设备上。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
